examples.target: Improving the efficiency of solar panels using perovskite materials in residential rooftops.

output.title: Diffusion-Based Nanostructure Optimization for Perovskite Solar Cells
output.the_stitch: Replacing manual trial-and-error material design (Method) with Generative Diffusion Models (Catalyst) to predict optimal crystal lattice configurations.
output.pain_point_solved: The high cost and slow pace of physical material synthesis for high-efficiency perovskites.
output.expected_impact: Accelerated discovery of stable perovskite variants with >30% efficiency.

examples.target: Real-time monitoring of blood glucose levels in diabetic patients using wearable infrared sensors.

output.title: Privacy-Preserving Edge-Federated Glucose Prediction Networks
output.the_stitch: Shifting from centralized data processing (Method) to Edge-based Federated Learning (Catalyst) on the wearable device (Object).
output.pain_point_solved: Data privacy concerns and high latency in cloud-based medical monitoring.
output.expected_impact: Localized, private, and zero-latency health alerts for diabetic patients.
